sections.heading: Who we are
body: Hoba! (@hobagame_bot) is a Telegram Mini App party game, operated by Volodymyr Yahello. Contact: vyahello@gmail.com.

sections.heading: What we collect
body: From Telegram's initData when you open the app: your Telegram numeric ID, your first name (and optionally last name and username), and your client language code.
From playing: wheels you create, rooms you join and your role, spins you trigger, reactions you send, and wheels you publish, like, or report.

sections.heading: What we do NOT collect
body: We never collect your phone number, email, contacts, messages or media outside the Mini App, your location, or precise device identifiers.

sections.heading: How we use it
body: Only to run the game: identify your session, show your name to other players in a room, sync spins in real time, and power the saved-wheel library and trending feed. We do not sell your data or use it for advertising.

sections.heading: Retention
body: Rooms are ephemeral and idle rooms are closed automatically. You can delete your saved wheels at any time. Aggregate, non-identifying counts (like a wheel's use count) may persist.

sections.heading: Your choices
body: You control your language, sound, and haptics in Settings. To request deletion of your account data, contact vyahello@gmail.com.

sections.heading: Acceptance
body: By using Hoba! you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

sections.heading: The service
body: Hoba! is a free party game for making group decisions with a spinning wheel. It is provided as-is, and may change or be unavailable at times.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
body: Don't use Hoba! to harass others, post illegal content, or abuse the service. Wheel titles and options you make public are filtered for profanity and may be hidden after reports.
You are responsible for the content you create and share.

sections.heading: Public wheels and moderation
body: When you make a wheel public it appears in Trending to other users. We may hide or remove public wheels that are reported or violate these terms, at our discretion.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
body: Hoba! is for fun. Outcomes are random and provided without warranty. We are not liable for decisions made using the app.

sections.heading: Changes and contact
body: We may update these terms; continued use means you accept the changes. Questions: vyahello@gmail.com.
